records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh! What was that...? Did a gas explosion happen somewhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh! What was that...? Did a gas explosion happen somewhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh! What was that...? Did a gas explosion happen somewhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got lucky. All my limbs are fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got lucky. All my limbs are fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got lucky. All my limbs are fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what about the kid?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what about the kid?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what about the kid?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness. It's weak, but she's still breathing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness. It's weak, but she's still breathing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness. It's weak, but she's still breathing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But my oxygen tank is broken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But my oxygen tank is broken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But my oxygen tank is broken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We won't be able to last long. We need to get out of here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We won't be able to last long. We need to get out of here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We won't be able to last long. We need to get out of here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Errrgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Errrgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Errrgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Captain?! You okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Captain?! You okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Captain?! You okay?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knucklehead...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knucklehead...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knucklehead...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The child.. What happened to her...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The child.. What happened to her...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The child.. What happened to her...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's alive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's alive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's alive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-besides that...! The rubble from the collapsed building crushed your lower body!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-besides that...! The rubble from the collapsed building crushed your lower body!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-besides that...! The rubble from the collapsed building crushed your lower body!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-there's a lot of blood!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-there's a lot of blood!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-there's a lot of blood!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so...? That's odd. Why don't I feel any pain...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so...? That's odd. Why don't I feel any pain...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so...? That's odd. Why don't I feel any pain...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get you out now, so stop talking!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get you out now, so stop talking!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get you out now, so stop talking!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh!! C'mon!! MOOOVE...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh!! C'mon!! MOOOVE...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh!! C'mon!! MOOOVE...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ERRRGH!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ERRRGH!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ERRRGH!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just hang in there... a little longer...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just hang in there... a little longer...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just hang in there... a little longer...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Argh!! I'll... get you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Argh!! I'll... get you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Argh!! I'll... get you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agh!! AAAAARGH...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agh!! AAAAARGH...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agh!! AAAAARGH...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did it! I cleared the rubble!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did it! I cleared the rubble!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did it! I cleared the rubble!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! I'll support you! So!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! I'll support you! So!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! I'll support you! So!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that was... on top of me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that was... on top of me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that was... on top of me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-how did you manage to lift that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-how did you manage to lift that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-how did you manage to lift that?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I don
8kt know, sir!!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I don
8kt know, sir!!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I don
8kt know, sir!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not the point! We gotta get out of here!! The building might collapse even more!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not the point! We gotta get out of here!! The building might collapse even more!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not the point! We gotta get out of here!! The building might collapse even more!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, knucklehead... I'm in trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, knucklehead... I'm in trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, knucklehead... I'm in trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't move my legs. I can't feel anything below the waist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't move my legs. I can't feel anything below the waist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't move my legs. I can't feel anything below the waist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're gonna be fine! Just hold on a little longer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're gonna be fine! Just hold on a little longer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're gonna be fine! Just hold on a little longer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll be good as new after getting treated!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll be good as new after getting treated!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be good as new after getting treated!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about the kid? Is she all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about the kid? Is she all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about the kid? Is she all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's still breathing, but my oxygen tank is broken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's still breathing, but my oxygen tank is broken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's still breathing, but my oxygen tank is broken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we have to hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we have to hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we have to hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing? Why are you taking off your mask...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing? Why are you taking off your mask...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing? Why are you taking off your mask...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fire's getting bigger, and I can't move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fire's getting bigger, and I can't move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fire's getting bigger, and I can't move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use my oxygen tank. Saving the kid is our number one priority.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Use my oxygen tank. Saving the kid is our number one priority.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Use my oxygen tank. Saving the kid is our number one priority.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might not have enough oxygen... for all three of us to get out of here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might not have enough oxygen... for all three of us to get out of here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might not have enough oxygen... for all three of us to get out of here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say that! Don't give up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say that! Don't give up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say that! Don't give up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that a firefighter shouldn't give up on the rescuee's and their own life!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that a firefighter shouldn't give up on the rescuee's and their own life!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that a firefighter shouldn't give up on the rescuee's and their own life!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said it wasn't worth losing your life over!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said it wasn't worth losing your life over!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said it wasn't worth losing your life over!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit!! But you have to save that kid!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit!! But you have to save that kid!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit!! But you have to save that kid!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's nothing else we can do!! That kid's parents are out there waiting for her to return to their arms!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's nothing else we can do!! That kid's parents are out there waiting for her to return to their arms!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's nothing else we can do!! That kid's parents are out there waiting for her to return to their arms!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you also have a family, sir...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you also have a family, sir...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you also have a family, sir...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's my choice...! My time has come...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's my choice...! My time has come...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's my choice...! My time has come...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no regrets!! So go!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no regrets!! So go!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no regrets!! So go!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Gah! Roger that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Gah! Roger that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Gah! Roger that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uhhhh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uhhhh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uhhhh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I haven't given up on you yet, Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I haven't given up on you yet, Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I haven't given up on you yet, Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... I'll be back for you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... I'll be back for you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... I'll be back for you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you'd better stay alive until I get back!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you'd better stay alive until I get back!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you'd better stay alive until I get back!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, the main staircase didn't collapse!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, the main staircase didn't collapse!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, the main staircase didn't collapse!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hang in there, kid. I'll get you out of this hellhole!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hang in there, kid. I'll get you out of this hellhole!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hang in there, kid. I'll get you out of this hellhole!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Hold on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Hold on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Hold on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that... a person lying down there...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that... a person lying down there...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that... a person lying down there...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fire suit?! It's the rescue team that went in before us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fire suit?! It's the rescue team that went in before us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fire suit?! It's the rescue team that went in before us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why are they here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why are they here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why are they here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see excessive bleeding from the abdomen...! They didn't die from the fire...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see excessive bleeding from the abdomen...! They didn't die from the fire...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see excessive bleeding from the abdomen...! They didn't die from the fire...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if they were torn apart by a beast...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if they were torn apart by a beast...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if they were torn apart by a beast...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are those monsters?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are those monsters?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are those monsters?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did those things kill the rescue team?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did those things kill the rescue team?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did those things kill the rescue team?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wild dogs? No, something's different!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wild dogs? No, something's different!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wild dogs? No, something's different!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way a wild dog would stay in a fire in the first place!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way a wild dog would stay in a fire in the first place!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way a wild dog would stay in a fire in the first place!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Crap, her breathing is getting weaker.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Crap, her breathing is getting weaker.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Crap, her breathing is getting weaker.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't have time to worry. I need to get out of here ASAP!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't have time to worry. I need to get out of here ASAP!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't have time to worry. I need to get out of here ASAP!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! So...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! So...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! So...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! That monster suddenly...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! That monster suddenly...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! That monster suddenly...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: An icicle... suddenly pierced that monster and it instantly froze...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An icicle... suddenly pierced that monster and it instantly froze...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An icicle... suddenly pierced that monster and it instantly froze...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or am I seeing things...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or am I seeing things...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or am I seeing things...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did that come from...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did that come from...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did that come from...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fire in the corridor leading to the main entrance has been extinguished and has frozen over!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fire in the corridor leading to the main entrance has been extinguished and has frozen over!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fire in the corridor leading to the main entrance has been extinguished and has frozen over!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah! I don't know what's going on, but now's my chance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah! I don't know what's going on, but now's my chance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah! I don't know what's going on, but now's my chance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But first, I need to get this kid out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But first, I need to get this kid out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But first, I need to get this kid out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The fire we reported earlier has yet to be extinguished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The fire we reported earlier has yet to be extinguished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The fire we reported earlier has yet to be extinguished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the fire department's initial suppression, the rescue team was deployed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the fire department's initial suppression, the rescue team was deployed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the fire department's initial suppression, the rescue team was deployed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, a sudden explosion caused the building to collapse, burying the dispatched rescue team in rubble...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, a sudden explosion caused the building to collapse, burying the dispatched rescue team in rubble...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, a sudden explosion caused the building to collapse, burying the dispatched rescue team in rubble...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! This just in. Breaking news!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! This just in. Breaking news!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! This just in. Breaking news!

records.m_Talk_ENG: One of the dispatched rescue team members got out of the fire safely!
records.m_Talk_DEU: One of the dispatched rescue team members got out of the fire safely!
records.m_Talk_FRA: One of the dispatched rescue team members got out of the fire safely!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A child...! She's holding a child in her arms!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A child...! She's holding a child in her arms!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A child...! She's holding a child in her arms!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over here! Get that photo! We can't miss a scoop like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over here! Get that photo! We can't miss a scoop like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over here! Get that photo! We can't miss a scoop like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way. She made it out alive in that fire?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way. She made it out alive in that fire?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way. She made it out alive in that fire?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But that firefighter, doesn't she look a little weird?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But that firefighter, doesn't she look a little weird?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But that firefighter, doesn't she look a little weird?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She has animal ears on her head...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She has animal ears on her head...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She has animal ears on her head...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: One child... rescue complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One child... rescue complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One child... rescue complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's not breathing! Please, hurry...! Help her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's not breathing! Please, hurry...! Help her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's not breathing! Please, hurry...! Help her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to get back in there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to get back in there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to get back in there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My captain... is still in that fire!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My captain... is still in that fire!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My captain... is still in that fire!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Officer Braidwood!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Officer Braidwood!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Officer Braidwood!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cool it and answer me! What happened to the rest of your team who went in?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cool it and answer me! What happened to the rest of your team who went in?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cool it and answer me! What happened to the rest of your team who went in?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't go in there again! There's a risk of a secondary collapse!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't go in there again! There's a risk of a secondary collapse!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't go in there again! There's a risk of a secondary collapse!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, stop her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, stop her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, stop her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Let go of me!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Let go of me!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Let go of me!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let me go, you jerks!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let me go, you jerks!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let me go, you jerks!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to go back in there!! Captain's still in there waiting for me!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to go back in there!! Captain's still in there waiting for me!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to go back in there!! Captain's still in there waiting for me!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Dammit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Dammit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Dammit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAAAAAARGH!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAAAAAARGH!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAAAAAARGH!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Without knowing anything and unable to save anyone.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Without knowing anything and unable to save anyone.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Without knowing anything and unable to save anyone.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Alone in the raging fire.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Alone in the raging fire.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Alone in the raging fire.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Only I survived.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Only I survived.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Only I survived.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The removal and search for residual fires are currently underway at the completely burned site.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The removal and search for residual fires are currently underway at the completely burned site.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The removal and search for residual fires are currently underway at the completely burned site.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fire officials announced that the sudden explosion during the fire was caused by a flashover.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fire officials announced that the sudden explosion during the fire was caused by a flashover.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fire officials announced that the sudden explosion during the fire was caused by a flashover.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A flashover is when accumulated combustible gas comes into contact with high heat, resulting in an explosion...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A flashover is when accumulated combustible gas comes into contact with high heat, resulting in an explosion...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A flashover is when accumulated combustible gas comes into contact with high heat, resulting in an explosion...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander, so what happened in the end?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander, so what happened in the end?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander, so what happened in the end?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We completed our mission. The rest of the cover-up will be done by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We completed our mission. The rest of the cover-up will be done by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We completed our mission. The rest of the cover-up will be done by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! I don't care about the mission!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! I don't care about the mission!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! I don't care about the mission!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I do care about is the newly awakened <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I do care about is the newly awakened <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I do care about is the newly awakened <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's so special about her that Hive Control chose her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's so special about her that Hive Control chose her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's so special about her that Hive Control chose her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, I'm so curious to see that mug of hers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, I'm so curious to see that mug of hers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, I'm so curious to see that mug of hers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, if you're asking about her first impression...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, if you're asking about her first impression...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, if you're asking about her first impression...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, should I say she's like a poor stray cat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, should I say she's like a poor stray cat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, should I say she's like a poor stray cat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A cat? But I hate cats!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A cat? But I hate cats!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A cat? But I hate cats!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fu fuu.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fu fuu.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fu fuu.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But she's soon going to be part of our family, so don't hate her too much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But she's soon going to be part of our family, so don't hate her too much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But she's soon going to be part of our family, so don't hate her too much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Anyway, I'm against it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Anyway, I'm against it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Anyway, I'm against it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A cat...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A cat...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A cat...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe our division will be bustling again like it used to be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe our division will be bustling again like it used to be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe our division will be bustling again like it used to be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh! What was that...? Did a gas explosion happen somewhere?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh! What was that...? Did a gas explosion happen somewhere?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh! What was that...? Did a gas explosion happen somewhere?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I got lucky. All my limbs are fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I got lucky. All my limbs are fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I got lucky. All my limbs are fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what about the kid?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what about the kid?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what about the kid?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness. It's weak, but she's still breathing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness. It's weak, but she's still breathing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness. It's weak, but she's still breathing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But my oxygen tank is broken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But my oxygen tank is broken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But my oxygen tank is broken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We won't be able to last long. We need to get out of here...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We won't be able to last long. We need to get out of here...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We won't be able to last long. We need to get out of here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Errrgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Errrgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Errrgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-Captain?! You okay?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-Captain?! You okay?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-Captain?! You okay?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knucklehead...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knucklehead...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knucklehead...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The child.. What happened to her...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The child.. What happened to her...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The child.. What happened to her...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's alive!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's alive!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's alive!

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-besides that...! The rubble from the collapsed building crushed your lower body!
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-besides that...! The rubble from the collapsed building crushed your lower body!
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-besides that...! The rubble from the collapsed building crushed your lower body!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-there's a lot of blood!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-there's a lot of blood!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-there's a lot of blood!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so...? That's odd. Why don't I feel any pain...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so...? That's odd. Why don't I feel any pain...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so...? That's odd. Why don't I feel any pain...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get you out now, so stop talking!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get you out now, so stop talking!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get you out now, so stop talking!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh!! C'mon!! MOOOVE...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh!! C'mon!! MOOOVE...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh!! C'mon!! MOOOVE...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ERRRGH!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ERRRGH!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ERRRGH!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just hang in there... a little longer...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just hang in there... a little longer...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just hang in there... a little longer...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Argh!! I'll... get you...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Argh!! I'll... get you...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Argh!! I'll... get you...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agh!! AAAAARGH...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agh!! AAAAARGH...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agh!! AAAAARGH...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: I did it! I cleared the rubble!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I did it! I cleared the rubble!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I did it! I cleared the rubble!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! I'll support you! So!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! I'll support you! So!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! I'll support you! So!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that was... on top of me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that was... on top of me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that was... on top of me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-how did you manage to lift that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-how did you manage to lift that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-how did you manage to lift that?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I don
8kt know, sir!!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I don
8kt know, sir!!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I don
8kt know, sir!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not the point! We gotta get out of here!! The building might collapse even more!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not the point! We gotta get out of here!! The building might collapse even more!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not the point! We gotta get out of here!! The building might collapse even more!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, knucklehead... I'm in trouble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, knucklehead... I'm in trouble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, knucklehead... I'm in trouble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't move my legs. I can't feel anything below the waist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't move my legs. I can't feel anything below the waist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't move my legs. I can't feel anything below the waist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're gonna be fine! Just hold on a little longer!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're gonna be fine! Just hold on a little longer!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're gonna be fine! Just hold on a little longer!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'll be good as new after getting treated!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'll be good as new after getting treated!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be good as new after getting treated!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What about the kid? Is she all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What about the kid? Is she all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What about the kid? Is she all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's still breathing, but my oxygen tank is broken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's still breathing, but my oxygen tank is broken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's still breathing, but my oxygen tank is broken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So we have to hurry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So we have to hurry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So we have to hurry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing? Why are you taking off your mask...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing? Why are you taking off your mask...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing? Why are you taking off your mask...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The fire's getting bigger, and I can't move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The fire's getting bigger, and I can't move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The fire's getting bigger, and I can't move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Use my oxygen tank. Saving the kid is our number one priority.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Use my oxygen tank. Saving the kid is our number one priority.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Use my oxygen tank. Saving the kid is our number one priority.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We might not have enough oxygen... for all three of us to get out of here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We might not have enough oxygen... for all three of us to get out of here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We might not have enough oxygen... for all three of us to get out of here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say that! Don't give up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say that! Don't give up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say that! Don't give up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said that a firefighter shouldn't give up on the rescuee's and their own life!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said that a firefighter shouldn't give up on the rescuee's and their own life!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said that a firefighter shouldn't give up on the rescuee's and their own life!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said it wasn't worth losing your life over!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said it wasn't worth losing your life over!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said it wasn't worth losing your life over!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit!! But you have to save that kid!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit!! But you have to save that kid!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit!! But you have to save that kid!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's nothing else we can do!! That kid's parents are out there waiting for her to return to their arms!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's nothing else we can do!! That kid's parents are out there waiting for her to return to their arms!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's nothing else we can do!! That kid's parents are out there waiting for her to return to their arms!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you also have a family, sir...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you also have a family, sir...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you also have a family, sir...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's my choice...! My time has come...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's my choice...! My time has come...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's my choice...! My time has come...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no regrets!! So go!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no regrets!! So go!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no regrets!! So go!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Gah! Roger that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Gah! Roger that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Gah! Roger that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uhhhh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uhhhh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uhhhh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I haven't given up on you yet, Captain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I haven't given up on you yet, Captain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I haven't given up on you yet, Captain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... I'll be back for you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... I'll be back for you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... I'll be back for you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you'd better stay alive until I get back!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you'd better stay alive until I get back!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you'd better stay alive until I get back!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, the main staircase didn't collapse!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, the main staircase didn't collapse!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, the main staircase didn't collapse!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hang in there, kid. I'll get you out of this hellhole!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hang in there, kid. I'll get you out of this hellhole!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hang in there, kid. I'll get you out of this hellhole!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Hold on...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Hold on...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Hold on...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that... a person lying down there...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that... a person lying down there...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that... a person lying down there...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A fire suit?! It's the rescue team that went in before us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A fire suit?! It's the rescue team that went in before us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A fire suit?! It's the rescue team that went in before us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But why are they here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But why are they here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But why are they here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see excessive bleeding from the abdomen...! They didn't die from the fire...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see excessive bleeding from the abdomen...! They didn't die from the fire...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see excessive bleeding from the abdomen...! They didn't die from the fire...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if they were torn apart by a beast...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if they were torn apart by a beast...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if they were torn apart by a beast...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are those monsters?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are those monsters?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are those monsters?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did those things kill the rescue team?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did those things kill the rescue team?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did those things kill the rescue team?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wild dogs? No, something's different!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wild dogs? No, something's different!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wild dogs? No, something's different!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way a wild dog would stay in a fire in the first place!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way a wild dog would stay in a fire in the first place!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way a wild dog would stay in a fire in the first place!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Crap, her breathing is getting weaker.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Crap, her breathing is getting weaker.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Crap, her breathing is getting weaker.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't have time to worry. I need to get out of here ASAP!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't have time to worry. I need to get out of here ASAP!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't have time to worry. I need to get out of here ASAP!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! So...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! So...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! So...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! That monster suddenly...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! That monster suddenly...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! That monster suddenly...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: An icicle... suddenly pierced that monster and it instantly froze...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An icicle... suddenly pierced that monster and it instantly froze...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An icicle... suddenly pierced that monster and it instantly froze...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or am I seeing things...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or am I seeing things...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or am I seeing things...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where did that come from...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where did that come from...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where did that come from...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The fire in the corridor leading to the main entrance has been extinguished and has frozen over!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The fire in the corridor leading to the main entrance has been extinguished and has frozen over!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The fire in the corridor leading to the main entrance has been extinguished and has frozen over!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah! I don't know what's going on, but now's my chance!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah! I don't know what's going on, but now's my chance!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah! I don't know what's going on, but now's my chance!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But first, I need to get this kid out of here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But first, I need to get this kid out of here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But first, I need to get this kid out of here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The fire we reported earlier has yet to be extinguished.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The fire we reported earlier has yet to be extinguished.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The fire we reported earlier has yet to be extinguished.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After the fire department's initial suppression, the rescue team was deployed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After the fire department's initial suppression, the rescue team was deployed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After the fire department's initial suppression, the rescue team was deployed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, a sudden explosion caused the building to collapse, burying the dispatched rescue team in rubble...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, a sudden explosion caused the building to collapse, burying the dispatched rescue team in rubble...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, a sudden explosion caused the building to collapse, burying the dispatched rescue team in rubble...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! This just in. Breaking news!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! This just in. Breaking news!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! This just in. Breaking news!

root.m_Talk_ENG: One of the dispatched rescue team members got out of the fire safely!
root.m_Talk_DEU: One of the dispatched rescue team members got out of the fire safely!
root.m_Talk_FRA: One of the dispatched rescue team members got out of the fire safely!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A child...! She's holding a child in her arms!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A child...! She's holding a child in her arms!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A child...! She's holding a child in her arms!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Over here! Get that photo! We can't miss a scoop like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Over here! Get that photo! We can't miss a scoop like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Over here! Get that photo! We can't miss a scoop like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No way. She made it out alive in that fire?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No way. She made it out alive in that fire?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No way. She made it out alive in that fire?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But that firefighter, doesn't she look a little weird?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But that firefighter, doesn't she look a little weird?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But that firefighter, doesn't she look a little weird?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She has animal ears on her head...
root.m_Talk_DEU: She has animal ears on her head...
root.m_Talk_FRA: She has animal ears on her head...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: One child... rescue complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One child... rescue complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One child... rescue complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's not breathing! Please, hurry...! Help her!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's not breathing! Please, hurry...! Help her!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's not breathing! Please, hurry...! Help her!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to get back in there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to get back in there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to get back in there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My captain... is still in that fire!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My captain... is still in that fire!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My captain... is still in that fire!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Officer Braidwood!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Officer Braidwood!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Officer Braidwood!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cool it and answer me! What happened to the rest of your team who went in?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cool it and answer me! What happened to the rest of your team who went in?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cool it and answer me! What happened to the rest of your team who went in?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't go in there again! There's a risk of a secondary collapse!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't go in there again! There's a risk of a secondary collapse!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't go in there again! There's a risk of a secondary collapse!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, stop her!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, stop her!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, stop her!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Let go of me!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Let go of me!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Let go of me!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let me go, you jerks!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let me go, you jerks!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let me go, you jerks!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to go back in there!! Captain's still in there waiting for me!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to go back in there!! Captain's still in there waiting for me!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to go back in there!! Captain's still in there waiting for me!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Dammit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Dammit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Dammit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: AAAAAAARGH!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AAAAAAARGH!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AAAAAAARGH!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>At that time, I knew nothing.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Without knowing anything and unable to save anyone.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Without knowing anything and unable to save anyone.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Without knowing anything and unable to save anyone.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Alone in the raging fire.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Alone in the raging fire.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Alone in the raging fire.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Only I survived.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Only I survived.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Only I survived.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The removal and search for residual fires are currently underway at the completely burned site.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The removal and search for residual fires are currently underway at the completely burned site.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The removal and search for residual fires are currently underway at the completely burned site.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fire officials announced that the sudden explosion during the fire was caused by a flashover.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fire officials announced that the sudden explosion during the fire was caused by a flashover.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fire officials announced that the sudden explosion during the fire was caused by a flashover.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A flashover is when accumulated combustible gas comes into contact with high heat, resulting in an explosion...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A flashover is when accumulated combustible gas comes into contact with high heat, resulting in an explosion...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A flashover is when accumulated combustible gas comes into contact with high heat, resulting in an explosion...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander, so what happened in the end?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander, so what happened in the end?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander, so what happened in the end?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We completed our mission. The rest of the cover-up will be done by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We completed our mission. The rest of the cover-up will be done by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We completed our mission. The rest of the cover-up will be done by the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! I don't care about the mission!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! I don't care about the mission!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! I don't care about the mission!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What I do care about is the newly awakened <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What I do care about is the newly awakened <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What I do care about is the newly awakened <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's so special about her that Hive Control chose her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's so special about her that Hive Control chose her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's so special about her that Hive Control chose her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, I'm so curious to see that mug of hers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, I'm so curious to see that mug of hers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, I'm so curious to see that mug of hers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, if you're asking about her first impression...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, if you're asking about her first impression...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, if you're asking about her first impression...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, should I say she's like a poor stray cat?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, should I say she's like a poor stray cat?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, should I say she's like a poor stray cat?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A cat? But I hate cats!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A cat? But I hate cats!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A cat? But I hate cats!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fu fuu.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fu fuu.
